children.label: Getting Started
children.description: An introduction to help you understand the core components.

children.label: Auth H3 Client
children.description: Seamlessly enforce OAuth 2.0 authentication and session management integrated directly as the client of the IAM module.

children.label: IAM
children.description: Identity and Access Management featuring granular roles, permissions, and security policies.

children.label: Bot Detection
children.description: Advanced behavioral analysis and request fingerprinting to stop malicious automated traffic.

children.label: Shield Base
children.description: CLI and programmatic toolkit for compiling offline-ready IP intelligence databases from BGP, GeoIP, Tor, FireHOL, and other public threat feeds.

children.label: Utils
children.description: A standard library of highly optimized helpers for formatting, validation, and core logic.
